scope_note: These cards cover additional channel-derived program leads that were absent from the original partial registry. They are source-native starting packets, not complete dossiers, repair selections, or rankings. Programs remain split by version and claim; people are not ranked.

cards.canonical_version_scope: Loop quantum cosmology as a symmetry-reduced application of loop quantum gravity; distinct effective-dynamics and perturbation programs require later splitting.

primary_sources.title: Loop Quantum Cosmology: A Status Report
Generalized effective description of loop quantum cosmology

cards.source_native_claim: Polymer-style quantization of homogeneous cosmological geometries replaces the classical big-bang singularity in important models with quantum evolution through a bounce and yields controlled effective equations in specified regimes.
cards.strongest_result: Mathematically explicit singularity resolution and effective bounce dynamics in tightly specified symmetry-reduced models, with a developed perturbation and phenomenology program.
cards.assumptions_limits: Imports Hilbert and holonomy-flux structures, symmetry reduction, internal-clock and quantization choices; robustness across prescriptions and derivation from full LQG remain nontrivial. A bounce is not by itself a confirmed cosmology.
cards.external_offers_joshua: A precise quantum-cosmology recovery target, explicit quantization ambiguities, and examples where discreteness has calculable dynamical consequences.
cards.joshua_hypothesis: A finite carrier tournament might expose which LQC discreteness and clock choices are actually needed and which are representation artifacts.
cards.decisive_test: Recover an agreed LQC model's constraint algebra, semiclassical Friedmann limit, bounce and perturbation observables under locked conventions, then predict a discriminator not already supplied by quantization ambiguity.

cards.canonical_version_scope: Relational quantum mechanics from the 1996 proposal through the clarified 2021 formulation; keep separate from loop quantum gravity and thermal-time work.

primary_sources.title: Relational Quantum Mechanics
The Relational Interpretation of Quantum Physics

cards.source_native_claim: Values of physical variables are realized only in interactions and are relative to other physical systems; there is no privileged observer or observer-independent global catalogue of values.
cards.strongest_result: A coherent observer-demoted interpretation that keeps standard quantum formalism and makes relational event claims explicit.
cards.assumptions_limits: Standard quantum mechanics and interaction structure are installed; cross-perspective consistency, records and probabilities require careful articulation. It currently supplies no distinct confirmed prediction.
cards.external_offers_joshua: A mature adversary to global-state and privileged-observer language, plus exact Wigner-friend comparison cases.
cards.joshua_hypothesis: Joshua's cross-view semiconjugacy could become a constructive criterion for when separately realized records may be treated as mutually compatible without positing one God's-eye state.
cards.decisive_test: Formalize the same finite multi-agent experiment in RQM, standard quantum instruments and Joshua's cross-view map; require unambiguous record-consistency predictions and no hidden global-state reconstruction.

cards.canonical_version_scope: Causal-set kinematics, classical sequential growth, and causal-set quantum-field constructions are separate subprograms and must not be scored as one result.

primary_sources.title: The causal set approach to quantum gravity
Classical sequential growth dynamics for causal sets
A manifestly covariant framework for causal set quantum field theory

cards.source_native_claim: A locally finite partial order can encode causal order and volume, with continuum spacetime approximated by faithful sprinklings and dynamics or quantum measures assigned over causal sets.
cards.strongest_result: A sharply defined discrete Lorentz-compatible kinematics, nontrivial sequential-growth classification and developed operators/QFT constructions; no unique realistic quantum dynamics is established.
cards.assumptions_limits: Causal order is primitive, local finiteness and Poisson sprinkling are installed, and manifold recovery is difficult. The Hauptvermutung and dynamics-to-GR bridge remain central burdens.
cards.external_offers_joshua: A serious finite order-based spacetime competitor, covariant random-discreteness tests and concrete manifold-recovery benchmarks.
cards.joshua_hypothesis: Joshua's schedule and carrier tournaments could test causal order against weaker dependency, distinguishability and noncausal order grammars instead of installing it as the root.
cards.decisive_test: On finite orders with known manifold and nonmanifold generators, compare causal-set observables and Joshua-derived quotients for dimension, locality, dynamics and held-out continuum recovery under equal complexity.

cards.canonical_version_scope: The 2011 entropic-force proposal and 2016 emergent-gravity/dark-universe model are distinct versions; this card targets the latter with the former as ancestry.

primary_sources.title: On the Origin of Gravity and the Laws of Newton
Emergent Gravity and the Dark Universe

cards.source_native_claim: Gravity and apparent dark-matter effects can arise from entropy, holographic information and an elastic response associated with de Sitter entropy rather than a fundamental force or particle dark matter.
cards.strongest_result: Derivation-like relations reproducing Newtonian scaling and a phenomenological relation for certain galaxy-scale dark-matter effects; the full relativistic, lensing, cluster and cosmological theory is incomplete.
cards.assumptions_limits: Area laws, holographic screens, temperature/equipartition or elastic-medium ingredients are installed; derivations can be reinterpretations of known dynamics. Empirical scope is narrower than a replacement for GR plus dark matter.
cards.external_offers_joshua: A worked entropy-to-gravity bridge and direct galaxy/lensing confrontation surfaces.
cards.joshua_hypothesis: Joshua's nested information geometry could force every entropy, partition and coarse-graining choice to be earned and separate genuine dynamics from thermodynamic redescription.
cards.decisive_test: Reproduce locked galaxy, lensing and cosmological predictions for the native model, then compare Joshua-transplanted and sham variants on held-out systems without post-hoc interpolation or hidden dark components.

cards.canonical_version_scope: ER=EPR is a conjectural bridge informed by AdS/CFT; holographic entropy formulae and tensor-network constructions are donor programs, not identical claims.

primary_sources.title: Cool horizons for entangled black holes
Holographic Derivation of Entanglement Entropy from AdS/CFT

cards.source_native_claim: Certain entangled states and nontraversable Einstein–Rosen bridges may be two descriptions of related structure; in AdS/CFT, boundary entanglement entropy is tied to bulk extremal area.
cards.strongest_result: Highly constrained holographic dualities and entropy/geometry calculations, not a general proof that all entanglement is spacetime or that our universe is AdS.
cards.assumptions_limits: Relies on quantum field theory, gravity and holographic duality in special regimes; dictionary, large-N/semiclassical limits and boundary conditions are installed. ER=EPR remains broader than its proved cases.
cards.external_offers_joshua: The hardest existing quantitative entropy-to-geometry recovery target and a warning that correspondence is regime- and dictionary-dependent.
cards.joshua_hypothesis: The cross-view and nested-geometry modules could search for weaker finite correspondences, but must earn the mapping and reproduce known holographic entropies first.
cards.decisive_test: On finite holographic codes with exact entropies and reconstruction wedges, recover the native dictionary, test alternative carriers and require out-of-sample geometry/reconstruction improvements.

cards.canonical_version_scope: Geometric Langlands/CFT and quantum q-Langlands correspondences are exact mathematical-physics programs, not claims that the Langlands program is itself a physical ToE.

primary_sources.title: Lectures on the Langlands Program and Conformal Field Theory
Quantum q-Langlands Correspondence

cards.source_native_claim: Deep equivalences connect representation-theoretic, geometric and conformal-block structures, with proved deformed correspondences for specified Lie-algebra classes.
cards.strongest_result: Exact correspondence theorems and computable dual descriptions in tightly specified mathematical settings.
cards.assumptions_limits: Large algebraic and geometric structures are installed; applicability to fundamental ontology or observed physics is not automatic. Analogy to unification is not empirical evidence.
cards.external_offers_joshua: Exact nontrivial dualities as a gold standard for any claimed cross-view bridge.
cards.joshua_hypothesis: Ratchet search might discover finite shadows or classify when two presentations carry the same demanded distinctions, but correspondence must be proved rather than narrated.
cards.decisive_test: Reproduce a finite nontrivial q-Langlands identity from two independently encoded sides, then test whether Joshua's bridge compresses the proof or predicts a new identity without installing the correspondence.

cards.canonical_version_scope: Relational best matching, shape dynamics and Janus-point/time-arrow models are related but distinct; later dossiers must split their mathematical and cosmological claims.

primary_sources.title: Shape Dynamics and the Problem of Time
A Gravitational Origin of the Arrows of Time

cards.source_native_claim: Relational shape degrees of freedom can replace absolute scale and, in certain formulations, refoliation symmetry; time's arrow may arise away from a low-complexity Janus point in an unconfined gravitational system.
cards.strongest_result: Nontrivial reformulations/duality with sectors of GR and exact relational N-body analyses; empirical distinction and realistic cosmology remain open.
cards.assumptions_limits: Configuration space, best matching, dynamics and complexity measures are installed; equivalence domains are restricted and matter/quantum completion unresolved. 'Timeless' can name several different theses.
cards.external_offers_joshua: A serious test of whether time, scale and geometry can be relationally reconstructed rather than primitive.
cards.joshua_hypothesis: Joshua's recurrence and order-open packets could compare clockless relational descriptions against primitive-time and history-dependent alternatives.
cards.decisive_test: Recover an exact relational model and its emergent clock/arrow with representation and gauge controls; require Joshua's version to reduce assumptions or predict a held-out relational observable.

cards.canonical_version_scope: The 2016/2018 extended-Wigner-friend theorem and its explicit assumptions; responses are separate programs.

primary_sources.title: Quantum theory cannot consistently describe the use of itself

cards.source_native_claim: A specified combination of universal quantum reasoning, single outcomes and cross-agent consistency yields contradictory certainty claims in an extended Wigner-friend experiment.
cards.strongest_result: A precise no-go construction that forces interpretations to identify which inference or ontology assumption they reject.
cards.assumptions_limits: Interpretation of the consistency, single-world and quantum-use assumptions is contested; the theorem does not simply prove that quantum theory is inconsistent.
cards.external_offers_joshua: A mandatory self-reference and cross-view consistency gate for the Holodeck and monist-bridge modules.
cards.joshua_hypothesis: Explicit view-relative records and semiconjugacies may identify exactly which inference transfers are licensed, rather than assuming global consistency.
cards.decisive_test: Encode the full protocol and every inference rule, reproduce the contradiction, then show Joshua's bridge blocks a specific invalid transfer while preserving ordinary agent predictions and composition.

cards.canonical_version_scope: Fourth-order Weyl conformal gravity with galaxy and cosmology applications; distinguish field theory, fitting program and scalar-sector debates.

primary_sources.title: Fitting galactic rotation curves with conformal gravity and a global quadratic potential
Structure of conformal gravity in the presence of a scale breaking scalar field

cards.source_native_claim: Local Weyl symmetry and fourth-order field equations can fit galaxy rotation curves using global linear/quadratic potentials without particle dark matter and offer an alternative cosmology.
cards.strongest_result: A broad galaxy-rotation fitting program with few universal parameters and a developed covariant field theory; global multi-probe adequacy and quantum consistency remain disputed.
cards.assumptions_limits: Continuum spacetime, conformal symmetry and fourth-order action are installed; fits face baryonic-mass, lensing, cluster, CMB and stability/unitarity tests. Successful curve fits do not select the theory alone.
cards.external_offers_joshua: A concrete non-Einsteinian gravity alternative with public astronomical constraints and explicit symmetry debt.
cards.joshua_hypothesis: The carrier and geometry tournaments could ask whether conformal structure is earned, but cannot substitute a qualitative entropy story for multi-probe calculations.
cards.decisive_test: Reproduce rotation, lensing, cluster, cosmology and weak-field predictions under one locked parameter policy; compare against GR/dark-matter baselines and any Joshua-derived correction on held-out systems.

cards.canonical_version_scope: The 2014 revised Orch OR theory; separate Penrose objective-reduction physics, microtubule biophysics and consciousness interpretation in later scoring.

primary_sources.title: Consciousness in the universe: A review of the Orch OR theory

cards.source_native_claim: Orchestrated quantum processes in neuronal microtubules undergo gravity-related objective reduction, producing discrete conscious events with noncomputable aspects.
cards.strongest_result: A cross-domain mechanistic proposal with some independently testable microtubule/anesthetic subclaims; no direct evidence connects objective reduction in microtubules to conscious contents.
cards.assumptions_limits: Imports objective collapse, spacetime-threshold estimates, biologically sustained quantum coherence and a consciousness mapping. Decoherence, physiological scale and Gödelian inferences are major disputed bridges.
cards.external_offers_joshua: A rare proposal with separable physical, biological and phenomenal bridge claims that can be killed independently.
cards.joshua_hypothesis: Ratchet receipts could prevent evidence for microtubule optics or anesthetic binding from being promoted into evidence for quantum consciousness.
cards.decisive_test: Predeclare coherence, collapse and conscious-event predictions; test them separately with sham microtubule models, temperature/noise controls and objective-collapse bounds. No repair exists unless the full bridge gains predictive force.

cards.canonical_version_scope: The 1995 local-horizon equilibrium derivation; non-equilibrium and entanglement-equilibrium extensions are separate versions.

primary_sources.title: Thermodynamics of Spacetime: The Einstein Equation of State
Entanglement equilibrium and the Einstein equation

cards.source_native_claim: Demanding a Clausius relation on every local Rindler horizon, together with entropy-area proportionality and Unruh temperature, yields the Einstein equation as an equation of state; later work connects stationarity of vacuum entanglement to the linearized equation.
cards.strongest_result: A compact, mathematically explicit recovery of gravitational field equations from thermodynamic assumptions.
cards.assumptions_limits: Local Lorentzian causal horizons, area entropy, temperature/heat identification and equilibrium assumptions carry much of the result; derivation does not identify microstates or provide quantum gravity.
cards.external_offers_joshua: The cleanest existing entropy-to-Einstein recovery gate and an exact ledger of the assumptions doing the work.
cards.joshua_hypothesis: Joshua could add value by deriving or varying horizon, entropy and equilibrium structure and showing which weaker candidates still recover the equation.
cards.decisive_test: Reproduce the derivation symbolically, then run an assumption tournament over entropy functional, causal structure and nonequilibrium terms; require correct GR coefficients and a new discriminator rather than verbal unification.

cards.canonical_version_scope: Invariant Set Theory in its finite-p fractal state-space formulation; separate proposed gravitational equations and quantum-symbolic constructions when evaluated.

primary_sources.title: Invariant Set Theory
Invariant Set Theory: Violating Measurement Independence without Fine Tuning

cards.source_native_claim: The universe evolves on a measure-zero, noncomputable fractal invariant set with a p-adic metric; quantum statistics and Bell violations arise through counterfactual incompleteness and measurement-dependence while retaining local causality and realism.
cards.strongest_result: An explicit geometric strategy for evading Bell assumptions without retrocausality plus finite symbolic constructions; no complete dynamics reproducing the full Standard Model and gravity is established.
cards.assumptions_limits: A special invariant set, p-adic geometry, noncomputability and cosmological constraint are installed; measure choice, dynamics, experimental distinctness and robustness of the no-fine-tuning claim require scrutiny.
cards.external_offers_joshua: A closer structural competitor than many familiar names: finite symbolic state space, nonclassical metric, top-down constraint and an explicit rejection of standard counterfactual grammar.
cards.joshua_hypothesis: The root-carrier and schedule tournaments could ask whether invariant-set/p-adic structure is forced or whether weaker finite behavioral quotients reproduce the same Bell and interference surface.
cards.decisive_test: Implement finite-p Bell/interference predictions with noise and counterfactual controls, compare to superdeterministic, retrocausal and CPTP baselines, and demand a preregistered deviation or real complexity reduction.

cards.canonical_version_scope: Thermo-dynamics as a manipulation-relative science; separate from Myrvold's other work on probability and quantum theory.

primary_sources.title: The Science of Theta Delta cs

cards.source_native_claim: Heat, work and entropy are best understood relative to a declared class of possible manipulations and effects; Gibbs and von Neumann entropies represent this operational thermodynamic entropy under reversible-process assumptions.
cards.strongest_result: A precise clarification of entropy's operational domain and uniqueness conditions, exposing why an unconstrained universal scalar drive is ill-posed.
cards.assumptions_limits: Manipulation repertoire and reversible availability are explicit installed choices; the framework does not supply cosmological microdynamics or a universal arrow.
cards.external_offers_joshua: A direct correction to any context-free entropy language: every entropy-like drive needs its intervention repertoire and operational task.
cards.joshua_hypothesis: Ratchet packets can make the manipulation class part of the candidate card and retain plural entropy measures when tasks differ.
cards.decisive_test: For the same finite system, enumerate manipulation classes and verify when entropy orderings agree or reverse; kill any Joshua universal-drive claim that ignores those changes.

cards.canonical_version_scope: Statistical supernova reanalyses and cosmic-dipole/anistropy claims; later datasets and rebuttals must be treated as adversarial versions.

primary_sources.title: Marginal evidence for cosmic acceleration from Type Ia supernovae
Evidence for anisotropy of cosmic acceleration
Do supernovae indicate an accelerating universe?

cards.source_native_claim: When supernova standardization, observer frame and anisotropic bulk flow are modeled differently, direct evidence for isotropic accelerated expansion may be weaker than standard Lambda-CDM analyses imply.
cards.strongest_result: Concrete likelihood reanalyses and reported dipole alignments that force scrutiny of frame and isotropy assumptions; conclusions remain actively contested and dataset-dependent.
cards.assumptions_limits: Supernova calibration, peculiar-velocity model, sky coverage, likelihood and frame choices matter; this is a critique of inference, not a complete alternative cosmology.
cards.external_offers_joshua: A real astronomical test that can kill post-hoc cosmogenesis stories and force observer/frame choices into the receipt.
cards.joshua_hypothesis: Joshua's framework may help compare inference grammars, but has no standing until it reproduces competing likelihoods and predicts held-out sky structure.
cards.decisive_test: Blindly replay standard and anisotropic analyses on updated independent catalogues with preregistered calibration/systematics; Joshua variants must beat both on held-out likelihood and prediction.

cards.canonical_version_scope: The CPT-symmetric universe and its right-handed-neutrino dark-matter consequences; keep distinct from Turok's other cyclic and conformal cosmologies.

primary_sources.title: CPT-Symmetric Universe

cards.source_native_claim: The pre- and post-big-bang universe can form a CPT pair, with symmetry selecting a vacuum and yielding economical dark-matter, neutrino and primordial-wave predictions.
cards.strongest_result: A constrained cosmological construction with concrete predictions including a stable right-handed-neutrino mass scale, a massless lightest neutrino and absence of primordial long-wavelength gravitational waves.
cards.assumptions_limits: Relies on exact global CPT extension, specified Standard-Model additions, cosmological background and vacuum prescription; viability against all cosmological/particle constraints is version-dependent.
cards.external_offers_joshua: A much sharper cosmogenesis competitor than a qualitative arrow story because it risks particle and gravitational-wave predictions.
cards.joshua_hypothesis: Joshua's chirality/order module might supply a deeper selection mechanism only if it derives the CPT structure and preserves those predictions.
cards.decisive_test: Recover the native particle abundance and cosmological perturbation calculations, then require a Joshua-derived variant to make an additional preregistered prediction or remove an explicit assumption.

cards.canonical_version_scope: Analytic idealism as a consciousness-only ontology centered on universal mind and dissociation; empirical arguments and metaphysical deductions require separate claim cards.

primary_sources.title: Analytic Idealism: A consciousness-only ontology

cards.source_native_claim: Phenomenal consciousness is the sole ontic category; individual minds are dissociated alters of universal consciousness and the physical world is the extrinsic appearance of mental processes.
cards.strongest_result: A relatively systematic monist ontology addressing combination/decomposition differently from constitutive panpsychism; its core evidence is abductive and philosophical rather than a unique quantitative prediction.
cards.assumptions_limits: Universal consciousness, dissociation analogy and intrinsic/extrinsic mapping are installed; bridge laws and discriminators against physicalism, neutral monism and other idealisms remain weak.
cards.external_offers_joshua: A direct monist rival that forces Joshua to say whether 'possibility/information' is ontology, method or merely a redescription of experience.
cards.joshua_hypothesis: Joshua's plural views and finite object formation could replace dissociation metaphor with explicit cross-view mechanics, but only if phenomenal and physical constraints are both recovered.
cards.decisive_test: Demand a formal map from universal process to individual reports and physical records, compare against neutral-monist and predictive-processing models, and require a unique intervention or compression gain.

cards.canonical_version_scope: Interface theory of perception, fitness-beats-truth evolutionary models and conscious-agent networks are connected but separable programs.

primary_sources.title: Objects of consciousness
The Interface Theory of Perception

cards.source_native_claim: Evolution selects fitness-tuned perceptual interfaces rather than veridical representations, and conscious agents can be modeled as interacting Markov kernels from which spacetime/objects are intended to emerge.
cards.strongest_result: Formal evolutionary-game examples showing fitness can favor lossy task-specific encodings and a compositional conscious-agent formalism; sweeping anti-realist and spacetime claims outrun those results.
cards.assumptions_limits: Fitness functions, world states, perceptual channels, Markov time and consciousness labels are installed; generality depends on game class and environment, and no accepted physical reconstruction is complete.
cards.external_offers_joshua: A strong formal rival for provisional worlds/interfaces and a warning that usefulness need not track truth.
cards.joshua_hypothesis: The Holodeck module could generalize interface formation while reopening fitness, time, Markov structure and primitive agent boundaries.
cards.decisive_test: Reproduce the native evolutionary games, add environment-shift and intervention controls, and compare native interfaces, predictive-state/IB baselines, Joshua wrapper and shams on held-out survival and calibration.

cards.canonical_version_scope: Biological relativity/no privileged level of causation; distinguish this principle from particular cardiac Physiome models and extended-evolution claims.

primary_sources.title: A theory of biological relativity: no privileged level of causation

cards.source_native_claim: No biological scale has universal causal privilege; constraints and influences operate across molecular, cellular, organ and organismal levels, so explanations should be multilevel and model-relative.
cards.strongest_result: A principled systems-biology critique of gene-centric causal privilege backed by multiscale physiological modeling; not a single quantitative law of biology.
cards.assumptions_limits: The principle can become permissive unless scale, intervention and explanatory task are explicit; 'downward causation' must be operationalized rather than inferred from feedback alone.
cards.external_offers_joshua: A direct biological version of deprivileging one description and real multiscale models against which boundary claims can be tested.
cards.joshua_hypothesis: Plural MSS views could formalize when several scales are irreducibly useful without reifying vague top-down causation.
cards.decisive_test: Use a multiscale physiological intervention dataset; compare single-level, explicit multilevel and Joshua-plural models on held-out interventions, with complexity and common-driver controls.

cards.canonical_version_scope: Interoceptive predictive coding/inference for presence, emotion and embodied self; 'controlled hallucination' is an explanatory slogan, not a separate formal theory.

primary_sources.title: An interoceptive predictive coding model of conscious presence
Interoceptive inference, emotion, and the embodied self

cards.source_native_claim: Perception and embodied selfhood depend on hierarchical predictions that minimize interoceptive prediction errors and regulate bodily state; conscious presence is tied to multisensory and interoceptive inference.
cards.strongest_result: A productive mechanistic framework connecting predictive processing with measurable interoception and body-ownership phenomena; it is not a complete theory of phenomenal consciousness.
cards.assumptions_limits: Generative hierarchy, prediction-error objective, precision weighting and body variables are installed; alternative state-space/control accounts can mimic many findings and neural mapping remains incomplete.
cards.external_offers_joshua: Concrete perceptual and interoceptive tasks that can ground the Holodeck instead of leaving it at metaphysical scale.
cards.joshua_hypothesis: Joshua's provisional-object and memory machinery could discover useful self-model boundaries while reopening the error metric and generative family.
cards.decisive_test: On preregistered interoceptive/body-ownership perturbations, compare predictive-processing, generic control/state-space, Joshua-wrapped and sham models on held-out trial-level predictions and complexity.

cards.canonical_version_scope: Density Matrix Realism plus the Initial Projection Hypothesis for the thermodynamic arrow; distinguish Everettian, Bohmian and collapse instantiations.

primary_sources.title: Quantum Mechanics in a Time-Asymmetric Universe
The Wentaculus: Density Matrix Realism Meets the Arrow of Time

cards.source_native_claim: A normalized projector onto a low-entropy Past-Hypothesis subspace can be the objective initial density matrix and a simple nomological boundary condition, unifying the arrow of time with quantum ontology and removing a separate statistical postulate.
cards.strongest_result: A precise reduction of vagueness and probabilistic postulates within a specified quantum-statistical framework; it remains empirically underdetermined from rival Past-Hypothesis packages.
cards.assumptions_limits: Hilbert space, low-entropy macrospace, boundary-condition law and quantum dynamics are installed; the origin/selection of the Past-Hypothesis subspace is not derived.
cards.external_offers_joshua: A clean rival to emergent-arrow rhetoric: one simple exact boundary law that earns many time asymmetries within the model.
cards.joshua_hypothesis: Recurrence/basin machinery might explain or replace the boundary condition only if it yields the same macro-arrow without selecting the low-entropy set by hand.
cards.decisive_test: Use finite quantum models with exact macrospaces to compare Wentaculus, typicality, two-boundary and Joshua recurrence accounts on arrows, retrodiction, installed bits and representation stability.
